checkpoint_contract.crash_loss_bound: at most the current gene lookup
checkpoint_contract.resume_rule: resume by loading completed gene symbols and continuing the sorted atlas gene list

coverage_rules.covered: NCBI maps the symbol and ORCS returns at least one T-cell filtered row
coverage_rules.mapped_no_tcell_rows: NCBI maps the symbol but ORCS returns zero T-cell filtered rows
coverage_rules.network_error: the lookup failed and must be retried before final freezing
coverage_rules.unmapped: NCBI does not map the symbol to a human gene id

honest_ceiling: Computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth.

source.name: BioGRID ORCS T-cell rows plus NIH NCBI Genes mapping

target_scale: all 11,526 genes in the current frozen atlas
